creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Simon, hi Alexander,

unfortunately, this PR with a patch for updating lang/icc ([1]) has been
around for quite a while without being processed, probably due to lack of
resources. (Not many people use icc, it seems.)

I'm trying to find out what the state of this is:

Simon: Is the patch you provided still up to date, i.e. applicable to the
current ports tree? Can you provide a complete patch including the
pkg-plist changes for download on a web server, maybe?

Alexander: Could you review the complete patch once it's there and comment
on it so I know if this can be committed?

Best regards and thanks to both of you,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108795
